title: The Whispering Shadow
writer: Barney A. Sarecky, George Morgan, Norman S. Hall
actors: Bela Lugosi, Viva Tattersall, Malcolm McGregor
plot: A mysterious criminal known as The Whispering Shadow commits crimes by means of a gang he controls by television and radio rays. Jack Norton, whose brother was murdered by The Whispering Shadow, suspects that the eerie Professor S...
